_description: Wave 198: eli-window running bit. ~34s. Status: SCRIPT BANKED, video_url fields are TODO. The visual joke: Eli is observably the only one doing actual work, and her work is counting fire hydrants.
title: Eli's Notebook

voiceover.instructions: Deadpan documentary register. Slow, level, slightly weary.

segments.name: title_open
segments.text:
THE NOTEBOOK

Maintained by
the Staff Writer
segments.narration: The notebook. Maintained by the Staff Writer.
segments.instructions: Documentary opener. Two short fragments. Falling tone on 'Writer'.

segments.name: eli_window
segments.video_url: TODO: generate Higgsfield clip — Eli at her window desk, looking out at the street with a small notebook open in her lap.
segments.narration: Eli sits by the window. She documents the city's fire hydrant population.
segments.instructions: Two sentences. The second is delivered as if it were 'she audits the quarterly returns.' No raised eyebrow.

segments.name: eli_count
segments.video_url: TODO: generate Higgsfield clip — Eli writing in the notebook, pen moving deliberately.
segments.narration: The notebook is up to three hundred and twelve.
segments.instructions: Numbers in full ('three hundred and twelve' not '312'). Said as if reading from an inventory. No emphasis.

segments.name: closing_tag
segments.instructions: Two words. The 'no comment' shrug is in the silence after. Hold the beat.
